mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, name, path, icon, sort_order AS sortOrder, deleted, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order AS sortOrder, m.deleted, m.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC
SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, name, path, icon, sort_order AS sortOrder, deleted, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, name, path, icon, sort_order AS sortOrder, deleted, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
